form.formComment: Form hard to fault. Last start won by 4 len at Mudgee Cl1-Sw April 5 over 2000m defeating Coyote carrying 59kg at $4.60. Before that came home strongly from last on the turn; 4th of 11 at Muswellbrook Bm58 on March 8 over 1750m, 1.75 len behind Grandini carrying 62kg at $8.50. Key chance expected to feature.

form.formComment: Chasing a hat-trick. Most recently favourite; won by 2 len at Port Macquarie Bm50 March 28 over 1815m in soft going defeating Piedi Veloci carrying 62kg at $2.80. The start before that favourite; won by 0.5 len at this track Cl1-Sw March 13 over 1900m in soft going defeating Sonder carrying 59kg at $9. Well placed. In great form and should be right in the thick of things again.
